name: Soft Pastel
author: akellainmotion
description: Rounded everything, soft gradients, warm pastels, gentle and approachable

componentOverrides.button: bg-pink-200 text-pink-900 rounded-2xl font-semibold px-6 py-3 hover:bg-pink-300 hover:shadow-lg transition-all border-0
componentOverrides.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-md border border-pink-100 p-6
componentOverrides.input: bg-white/80 rounded-xl border border-pink-200 focus:border-pink-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-200 px-4 py-2
componentOverrides.badge: bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 rounded-full text-xs font-medium px-3 py-1
componentOverrides.alert: bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4 text-blue-800
